title: Code Map Discipline
summary: Require a lightweight code-map check before non-trivial code changes via a managed recipe policy module.
content:
## Code Map Discipline

- Before non-trivial code edits, inspect `docs/code-map.md`, `CODEMAP.md`, or `.agentplane/code-map.md` when present.
- If no map exists and the change touches multiple files or runtime surfaces, create a concise `docs/code-map.md`.
- Keep the map factual: entry points, core modules, state/config boundaries, verification commands, and discovered hotspots.
- Compare the implementation plan against the map before mutating files; update only stale or missing sections relevant to the task.
- In the final response, state whether the map was consulted, created, or updated.
